---
pagetitle: "Co-Labs"
title: ""
page-layout: custom
sidebar: false
toc: false
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: ""
---

```{=html}
<style>
/* ── Reset Quarto chrome for full-bleed hero ─────────────────────── */
.page-layout-custom .content { max-width: 100%; padding: 0; }
#quarto-content { padding: 0; }

/* ── Hero ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.labs-hero {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0f172a 0%, #1e293b 60%, #0c1a2e 100%);
  padding: 2.5rem 2rem 3rem;
  text-align: center;
  color: white;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.labs-hero h1 {
  font-size: 2.6rem; font-weight: 900; margin: 0;
  letter-spacing: -0.02em; line-height: 1.1;
}
.labs-hero .subtitle {
  font-size: 1.0rem; color: #94a3b8; margin-top: 0.4rem;
  max-width: 500px; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;
}

/* ── Lab Preview Window ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
.lab-preview-link {
  display: block; text-decoration: none; color: inherit;
  max-width: 820px; margin: 1.75rem auto 0;
  transition: transform 0.25s ease, box-shadow 0.25s ease;
}
.lab-preview-link:hover {
  transform: translateY(-4px);
  text-decoration: none; color: inherit;
}
.lab-preview-link:hover .lab-window {
  box-shadow: 0 24px 72px rgba(99,102,241,0.25), 0 0 0 1px rgba(99,102,241,0.3);
}
.lab-window {
  background: #1e293b;
  border-radius: 12px;
  border: 1px solid #334155;
  box-shadow: 0 16px 56px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
  overflow: hidden;
  transition: box-shadow 0.25s ease;
}
/* macOS-style title bar */
.lab-window-bar {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
  padding: 10px 16px;
  background: #0f172a;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #334155;
}
.lab-window-dot {
  width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%;
}
.lab-window-dot.red    { background: #ef4444; }
.lab-window-dot.yellow { background: #eab308; }
.lab-window-dot.green  { background: #22c55e; }
.lab-window-tab {
  margin-left: 12px; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 600;
  color: #94a3b8; letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  font-family: 'SF Mono', 'Fira Code', monospace;
}
.lab-window-body {
  padding: 20px 24px 16px;
  text-align: left;
}

/* ── Three-panel flow inside the window ─────────────────────────── */
.lab-flow-panels {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr auto 1fr auto 1fr;
  gap: 0;
  align-items: start;
}
.lab-flow-arrow {
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  padding-top: 36px;
  color: #475569; font-size: 1.1rem;
}

/* Panel: Stakeholder Message */
.lp-panel {
  min-width: 0;
}
.lp-panel-label {
  font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 700; color: #64748b;
  text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.14em;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}
.lp-stakeholder {
  background: rgba(0,99,149,0.12);
  border-left: 3px solid #006395;
  border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;
  padding: 12px 14px;
}
.lp-stakeholder-byline {
  font-size: 0.6rem; font-weight: 700; color: #006395;
  text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  margin-bottom: 5px;
}
.lp-stakeholder-quote {
  font-style: italic; font-size: 0.78rem;
  color: #cbd5e1; line-height: 1.55;
}
.lp-stakeholder-name {
  font-size: 0.68rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 600;
  margin-top: 6px;
}

/* Panel: Prediction Lock */
.lp-prediction-box {
  background: rgba(99,102,241,0.08);
  border: 1px solid rgba(99,102,241,0.25);
  border-left: 3px solid #6366f1;
  border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;
  padding: 12px 14px;
}
.lp-prediction-q {
  font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 600; color: #c7d2fe;
  line-height: 1.5; margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.lp-option {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
  padding: 5px 10px; margin: 4px 0;
  background: rgba(99,102,241,0.10);
  border: 1px solid rgba(99,102,241,0.2);
  border-radius: 6px;
  font-size: 0.72rem; color: #a5b4fc;
  font-weight: 500;
}
.lp-option-radio {
  width: 12px; height: 12px; border-radius: 50%;
  border: 2px solid #6366f1; flex-shrink: 0;
}
.lp-option.selected {
  background: rgba(99,102,241,0.22);
  border-color: #818cf8;
}
.lp-option.selected .lp-option-radio {
  background: #6366f1;
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 2px #1e293b;
}
.lp-lock-warn {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
  margin-top: 8px; padding: 6px 10px;
  background: rgba(234,179,8,0.1);
  border: 1px solid rgba(234,179,8,0.2);
  border-radius: 6px;
  font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 600;
  color: #fbbf24;
}

/* Panel: Revealed Chart + Result */
.lp-reveal {
  position: relative;
}
.lp-result-callout {
  background: rgba(0,143,69,0.12);
  border: 1px solid rgba(0,143,69,0.3);
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 8px 12px;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.lp-result-callout .lp-result-icon {
  font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700;
  color: #4ade80; margin-bottom: 2px;
}
.lp-result-callout .lp-result-text {
  font-size: 0.7rem; color: #a7f3d0; line-height: 1.45;
}
/* Mini bar chart mockup */
.lp-chart {
  background: #0f172a;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 10px 12px 8px;
  border: 1px solid #334155;
}
.lp-chart-title {
  font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 700; color: #64748b;
  text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}
.lp-chart-bars {
  display: flex; align-items: flex-end; gap: 6px; height: 64px;
}
.lp-bar-group {
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;
  flex: 1; gap: 3px;
}
.lp-bar {
  width: 100%; border-radius: 3px 3px 0 0;
  min-height: 4px;
}
.lp-bar-label {
  font-size: 0.55rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 600;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.lp-chart-legend {
  display: flex; gap: 12px; margin-top: 6px;
}
.lp-legend-item {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px;
  font-size: 0.55rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 600;
}
.lp-legend-swatch {
  width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 2px;
}

/* ── HUD bar at bottom of window ───────────────────────────────── */
.lp-hud {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px;
  padding: 8px 24px;
  background: #0f172a;
  border-top: 1px solid #334155;
  font-family: 'SF Mono', 'Fira Code', monospace;
  font-size: 0.68rem;
}
.lp-hud-label { color: #64748b; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.06em; }
.lp-hud-value { color: #e2e8f0; }
.lp-hud-sep   { color: #334155; }
.lp-hud-active { color: #4ade80; }

/* ── CTA below preview ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
.hero-cta-row {
  display: flex; gap: 0.75rem; justify-content: center;
  margin-top: 1.25rem; flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.hero-launch-btn {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
  padding: 0.65rem 1.8rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6366f1, #4f46e5);
  color: white; border-radius: 8px;
  font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.88rem; text-decoration: none;
  transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.15s;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(99,102,241,0.3);
}
.hero-launch-btn:hover {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #818cf8, #6366f1);
  color: white; text-decoration: none; transform: translateY(-1px);
}
.hero-secondary-btn {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
  padding: 0.65rem 1.4rem;
  background: transparent; border: 1px solid #475569;
  color: #94a3b8; border-radius: 8px;
  font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.88rem; text-decoration: none;
  transition: border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s;
}
.hero-secondary-btn:hover {
  border-color: #6366f1; color: #c7d2fe; text-decoration: none;
}
.hero-stat-row {
  display: flex; gap: 2.5rem; justify-content: center;
  margin-top: 1rem; flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.hero-stat-num {
  font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 800; color: #e2e8f0;
  font-family: 'SF Mono', 'Fira Code', monospace;
  line-height: 1.2;
}
.hero-stat-label {
  font-size: 0.62rem; color: #64748b;
  text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em;
}

/* ── Main content area ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.labs-content { max-width: 960px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 2.5rem 1.5rem; }

/* ── Install ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.install-section {
  background: #0f172a; color: #e2e8f0;
  border-radius: 12px; padding: 1.5rem; margin: 2.5rem 0 1rem;
}
.install-section h3 { color: white; margin-top: 0; font-size: 1rem; }
.install-section p { font-size: 0.85rem; color: #94a3b8; }
.install-section code {
  background: #1e293b; padding: 0.15rem 0.4rem;
  border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.85rem; color: #93c5fd;
}
.install-section pre {
  background: #1e293b; padding: 1rem; border-radius: 8px;
  margin: 0.75rem 0; overflow-x: auto;
}
.install-section pre code { padding: 0; background: none; }

.footer-links {
  text-align: center; color: #94a3b8; font-size: 0.82rem;
  margin-top: 1.5rem; padding-bottom: 1rem;
}
.footer-links a { color: #64748b; }

/* ── Responsive ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .lab-flow-panels {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    gap: 12px;
  }
  .lab-flow-arrow {
    padding-top: 0;
    transform: rotate(90deg);
    font-size: 0.9rem;
  }
  .lab-window-body { padding: 16px; }
  .lp-hud { flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px 16px; }
}
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .labs-hero h1 { font-size: 2.2rem; }
  .hero-stat-row { gap: 1.5rem; }
}
</style>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!-- HERO                                                              -->
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="labs-hero">
  <h1>Co-Labs</h1>
  <p class="subtitle">
    33 browser-based labs where every simulator is locked until you commit a prediction.
  </p>

  <!-- ── Lab Preview Window ─────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <a href="vol1/lab_01_ml_intro/" class="lab-preview-link" aria-label="Launch Lab 01: The AI Triad">
    <div class="lab-window">

      <!-- Title bar -->
      <div class="lab-window-bar">
        <span class="lab-window-dot red"></span>
        <span class="lab-window-dot yellow"></span>
        <span class="lab-window-dot green"></span>
        <span class="lab-window-tab">Lab 01 &mdash; The AI Triad</span>
      </div>

      <!-- Three-panel flow -->
      <div class="lab-window-body">
        <div class="lab-flow-panels">

          <!-- PANEL 1: Stakeholder Message -->
          <div class="lp-panel">
            <div class="lp-panel-label">Step 1 &middot; Read the Scenario</div>
            <div class="lp-stakeholder">
              <div class="lp-stakeholder-byline">Incoming Message &middot; CTO</div>
              <div class="lp-stakeholder-quote">
                &ldquo;Our model accuracy dropped 8%. The infra team wants 4x more GPUs.
                The data team says training data is 18 months old. Who is right?&rdquo;
              </div>
              <div class="lp-stakeholder-name">&mdash; Dr. Priya Mehta, MedVision Health</div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="lab-flow-arrow">&rarr;</div>

          <!-- PANEL 2: Prediction Lock -->
          <div class="lp-panel">
            <div class="lp-panel-label">Step 2 &middot; Commit Your Prediction</div>
            <div class="lp-prediction-box">
              <div class="lp-prediction-q">
                The team buys 4x more GPUs.<br/>What happens to accuracy?
              </div>
              <div class="lp-option">
                <span class="lp-option-radio"></span>
                Improves ~4x (proportional)
              </div>
              <div class="lp-option">
                <span class="lp-option-radio"></span>
                Improves modestly (~1.3x)
              </div>
              <div class="lp-option selected">
                <span class="lp-option-radio"></span>
                No change &mdash; bottleneck elsewhere
              </div>
              <div class="lp-lock-warn">
                &#x1F512; Simulator locked until you predict
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="lab-flow-arrow">&rarr;</div>

          <!-- PANEL 3: Revealed Chart -->
          <div class="lp-panel lp-reveal">
            <div class="lp-panel-label">Step 3 &middot; See What Actually Happens</div>
            <div class="lp-result-callout">
              <div class="lp-result-icon">&#x2714; Correct</div>
              <div class="lp-result-text">
                The bottleneck is <strong>stale data</strong>, not compute.
                4x GPUs at $120K each = $0 accuracy gain.
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="lp-chart">
              <div class="lp-chart-title">D-A-M Diagnostic &mdash; ResNet-50</div>
              <div class="lp-chart-bars">
                <div class="lp-bar-group">
                  <div class="lp-bar" style="height: 44px; background: #ef4444;"></div>
                  <div class="lp-bar-label">Data</div>
                </div>
                <div class="lp-bar-group">
                  <div class="lp-bar" style="height: 22px; background: #6366f1;"></div>
                  <div class="lp-bar-label">Algorithm</div>
                </div>
                <div class="lp-bar-group">
                  <div class="lp-bar" style="height: 8px; background: #22c55e;"></div>
                  <div class="lp-bar-label">Machine</div>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div class="lp-chart-legend">
                <div class="lp-legend-item">
                  <span class="lp-legend-swatch" style="background:#ef4444;"></span> Binding
                </div>
                <div class="lp-legend-item">
                  <span class="lp-legend-swatch" style="background:#6366f1;"></span> Adequate
                </div>
                <div class="lp-legend-item">
                  <span class="lp-legend-swatch" style="background:#22c55e;"></span> Surplus
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

        </div><!-- /lab-flow-panels -->
      </div><!-- /lab-window-body -->

      <!-- HUD footer -->
      <div class="lp-hud">
        <span class="lp-hud-label">LAB</span>
        <span class="lp-hud-value">01 &middot; The AI Triad</span>
        <span class="lp-hud-sep">|</span>
        <span class="lp-hud-label">PARTS</span>
        <span class="lp-hud-value">4 + Synthesis</span>
        <span class="lp-hud-sep">|</span>
        <span class="lp-hud-label">STATUS</span>
        <span class="lp-hud-active">ready</span>
        <span style="margin-left: auto; color: #64748b; font-weight: 600;">Click anywhere to launch &rarr;</span>
      </div>

    </div><!-- /lab-window -->
  </a>

  <!-- CTA + stats below the preview -->
  <div class="hero-cta-row">
    <a href="vol1/lab_01_ml_intro/" class="hero-launch-btn">Launch Lab 01 &rarr;</a>
    <a href="vol1/lab_00_introduction/" class="hero-secondary-btn">Start Orientation</a>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-stat-row">
    <div>
      <div class="hero-stat-num">33</div>
      <div class="hero-stat-label">Interactive Labs</div>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div class="hero-stat-num">2</div>
      <div class="hero-stat-label">Volumes</div>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div class="hero-stat-num">~50</div>
      <div class="hero-stat-label">Min Each</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="labs-content">

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!-- INSTALL                                                           -->
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="install-section">
  <h3>Run Locally</h3>
  <p>Want to run labs offline or modify the simulations?</p>
  <pre><code>git clone https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book.git
cd cs249r_book/labs
pip install -r requirements.txt
marimo run vol1/lab_01_ml_intro.py</code></pre>
</div>

<div class="footer-links">
  Part of the <a href="../book/">Machine Learning Systems</a> textbook.
  <br/>
  <a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/discussions">Share feedback</a> &middot; <a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book">View source</a>
</div>

</div>
```
